name: wuphf-dev-tooling
description: Root-level dev tooling (secretlint, commitlint). The Go v0 app lives at the repo root; web UI lives in ./web with its own package.json; v1 protocol package lives in ./packages/protocol; v1 desktop shell lives in ./apps/desktop; installer-stub + release pipeline live in ./apps/installer-stub.

dependencyOverrideNotes.fast-uri: Pinned to 3.1.2 so bun audit --audit-level high stays clean for transitive Ajv consumers. Remove when all workspace dependency chains resolve to fast-uri 3.1.2 or newer without an override.
dependencyOverrideNotes.tar: Pinned to 7.5.15 (latest at time of pin) to evict the path-traversal/symlink-poisoning advisory chain (GHSA-34x7-hfp2-rc4v, -8qq5, -83g3, -qffp, -9ppj, -r6q2) that comes in transitively via electron-builder's own dependency tree. Remove when electron-builder ships a release whose deps resolve past tar 7.5.x natively.
